word: H8311 - שָׂרַע - sâraʻ - saw-rah' - Stretch out self

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂרע

Transliteration: śâra‛

Phonetic: saw-rah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to extend, stretch out
    1. (Qal) extended (participle)
    2. (Hithpael) to stretch oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2291

Part(s) of speech: Verb
